name: argent
description: Local-first personal finance desktop app, CLI, and agent tool suite.

scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @argent/core build && pnpm --filter @argent/mcp build && pnpm --filter @argent/plaid build && pnpm -r --workspace-concurrency=1 typecheck
scripts.ci: pnpm hygiene && pnpm typecheck && pnpm build && pnpm test && pnpm smoke
